mapper.sql: id, channel, external_approval_id, resource_type, resource_code, workspace_id, project_code, title, description, submit_remark, status, stage_chain, current_stage, decision_rule, required_count, resolved_at, expires_at, withdrawn_at, withdrawn_reason, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_approval_record where external_approval_id = #{externalApprovalId} limit 1
select id from t_r_approval_record where status = 'PENDING' and expires_at is not null and expires_at < #{now} order by expires_at asc limit #{limit}
